---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to herdr-fresh
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do?**

**Is this something Fresh itself already supports?**
herdr-fresh is deliberately just a launcher — it doesn't reimplement editor features (see
PLAN.md §2.2). If Fresh already has the capability you want, this is probably a request to
*surface* it as a herdr action/pane rather than build it here — say so if that's the shape.

**Proposed shape**
(new action id? change to an existing script? new config key?)

**Alternatives considered**
